MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-16-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514 Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty; Not Reported.
Appearances:

Tony Ruch, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
No appearance by defendant Gisela Venegas Rodriguez.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar as defendant failed to appeared for today's hearing.

This matter shall remain on the Master Jury Calendar for Monday, May 16,2011 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 206.
